args.topic: Content Quality: From CMS Migration to Clean Markdown (encoding, mojibake, Joomla/WordPress → Astro/Hugo)

article.title: Content Quality: From CMS Migration to Clean Markdown

competitor_gaps: Few migration guides combine charset/database diagnosis with SSG-specific Markdown hygiene in one checklist.
Tutorials often skip RSS/feed parity when explaining UTF-8 issues on WordPress exports.

seo.meta_title: Content Quality: From CMS Migration to Clean Markdown
seo.meta_description: Encoding artifacts, mojibake, and database quirks follow you from Joomla and WordPress into Astro and Hugo unless you audit, fix, and verify before cutover.
